# Applied Data Scientist
...
Are you passionate about using data science, artificial intelligence, and advanced analytics to propel decisions? If you are interested in driving meaningful change for a growth focused consumer products brand, this is an opportunity to join the market-leading Delta Faucet Company team as we use analytics to turbocharge strategic insights!
...
Reporting to the Manager of Data Science and Analytics, this role will work with analytics and domain specialists across the business to deliver high-impact insights and data science solutions. You will develop advanced analytical models, experimentation tests, applied AI techniques, and partner with business stakeholders to translate complex data into clear, actionable recommendations that support the company’s growth initiatives.
...
As an Applied Data Scientist within Delta Faucet Company’s Analytics Center of Excellence (ACoE), you will act as an owner of high impact analysis and data science initiatives that support complex, ambiguous business decisions. This role focuses on advanced analytics, experimentation, and applied AI.
...
- Independently lead end-to-end analytics and data science projects, from problem framing through delivery of actionable insights.
- Apply statistical methods, machine learning, and analytical modeling to solve business problems related to growth, customer behavior, market dynamics, and operational efficiency.
- Develop and maintain analytical data models and curated datasets, partnering with data engineering and BI teams.
- Build AI and machine learning solutions that are aligned with business needs.
- Collaborate closely with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into clear recommendations.
- Present data-driven recommendations to leaders across the organization, including tactical and C-suite.
...
- 4+ years of experience in data science, advanced analytics, or applied machine learning roles.
- 4+ years of hands-on experience applying statistical methods and analytical modeling to real business problems.
- 4+ years of experience using Python for data analysis, modeling, and experimentation.
- 4+ years of experience writing and refining complex SQL queries against large, structured datasets.
- 3+ years of experience partnering directly with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into actionable recommendations.
- 2+ years of experience working in a modern analytics platform (e.g., Databricks, Spark/PySpark, or similar).
- 1+ years of hands-on‑ experience applying generative AI technologies (e.g., LLM APIs, task‑specific GenAI workflows) in an enterprise analytics environment.
...
- Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, Economics, or a related quantitative field.
...
- 2+ years of experience with analytics engineering and data modeling, including building reusable, well-documented analytical datasets; familiarity with medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold) preferred.
- 1+ years of experience with model monitoring, experiment tracking, and model evaluation in production settings.
- 1+ years of experience with conjoint analysis or other stated-preference research methods.
...

results.title: Lead Data Scientist Job in Boston | Lennar Homes
highlights:
# Lead Data Scientist
...
- We require a bachelors or masters degree in Statistics, Economics, Math, Computer Science, Data Science, Machine Learning, or a related discipline, or equivalent practical experience. - We need 5+ years of relevant experience as a data scientist, machine learning engineer, or applied AI developer delivering production-ready models and systems; candidates with a PhD need 1+ year, and those with an MS need 3+ years. - We expect strong proficiency in Python and SQL, plus experience owning the full data science stack from data pipelines through model deployment. - We look for hands-on experience with AI development frameworks such as LangChain, Strands, Amazon Bedrock, AgentCore, or similar tools. - We require experience with experimentation methods including A/B testing, uplift modeling, multi-armed bandits, and causal machine learning. - We value exposure to machine vision techniques such as CNNs, transfer learning, and embeddings, as well as NLP methods including embeddings, transformers, and prompt engineering. - We expect familiarity with AI agent observability and evaluation tools such as LangFuse, RAGAS, Weights & Biases, or custom monitoring solutions. - We need experience integrating systems through APIs, A2A protocol, MCP servers, and orchestration pipelines. - We look for comfort working with large-scale, imperfect real-world data and making progress in complex environments. - We require strong engineering capability to design and maintain production pipelines, microservices, and scalable systems. - We value a proven ability to navigate ambiguity, prototype quickly, and move solutions into production. - We need a collaborative communicator who can align technical solutions with business priorities across varied stakeholders. - Bonus: we consider experience with RAG pipelines, LLM fine-tuning, RLHF, multi-agent orchestration, feature stores, survival analysis or churn modeling, and attribution modeling an advantage. - This is primarily a sedentary office role that requires the ability to operate computer equipment and perform physical movements such as speaking, hearing, bending, stooping, reaching, lifting, and carrying up to 25 lbs, with finger dexterity required.
...
- We design, build, and deploy autonomous AI agents using frameworks like Amazon Bedrock and AgentCore to solve business challenges in pricing, sales, operations, and customer interactions. - We apply machine vision and feature extraction to home attributes such as photos, plans, and finishes to support premium pricing and personalization strategies. - We engineer and maintain data pipelines and supporting systems for all models and agents, ensuring scalability and reliability. - We integrate agents with enterprise systems and protocols, including MCP servers, A2A protocol, and internal APIs. - We design and run experiments such as A/B tests, multi-armed bandits, and uplift models to measure and improve model and agent performance. - We ensure observability and reliability for deployed agents through logging, evaluation, monitoring, and drift detection. - We proactively gather stakeholder feedback and adapt our solutions to drive adoption and measurable business impact. - We translate complex data science and statistical findings into clear recommendations, narratives, and visualizations for executives and non-technical audiences. - We favor incremental, explainable solutions that deliver quick wins and can scale over time. - We experiment with new tools and approaches while maintaining robustness, governance, and production scalability. - We share learnings with the wider team to elevate our data science and agentic development practices across the organization. - We manage timelines and expectations transparently with both the data science team and business stakeholders.

# Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist
...
Posted Jun 30, 2026
...
The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. This is for an ambitious technologist, with the flexibility and personal drive to succeed in a dynamic environment where they are judged based on their direct impact to business outcomes.
...
- As a Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI within Cotiviti you will be responsible for delivering solutions that help our clients identify payment integrity issues, reduce the cost of healthcare processes, or improve the quality of healthcare outcomes. You will work as part of a team and will be individually responsible for the delivery of value associated with your projects. You will be expected to follow processes and practices that allow your models to be incorporated into our machine learning platform for production execution and monitoring, however, initial exploratory data analysis allows for more flexible experimentation to discover solutions to the business problems presented.
...
- Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Operations, along with product management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques.
...
- Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases.
...
- Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work.
...
- Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA.
...
- Work with production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance.
...
- Participate in other data science teams collaborating with your peers to support their projects.
...
- Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team.
...
- Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform.
...
- Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption.
...
- PhD or Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI.
...
- Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases.
...
- 9+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU.
...
- Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
- Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets.
...
- Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus.
...
- Passion for collaboration, learn it all mindset and driving value with AI.

# Senior Data Scientist - ML/AI Digital Workplace Experience

- We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Data Scientist to join our ML Digital Experience & Digital Workplace team. In this role, you will lead the design, development, and deployment of advanced machine learning models and Generative AI (GenAI) solutions that transform the digital workplace experience. You will work at the intersection of data science, AI innovation, and enterprise technology to deliver intelligent products and capabilities that drive productivity, automation, and enhanced user experiences across the organization. This is an opportunity to shape the future of how employees interact with digital tools and platforms by leveraging cutting-edge ML and GenAI technologies to solve complex business challenges at scale.
...
- Machine Learning & AI Development: Design, build, and deploy production-grade ML models with end-to-end pipelines and MLOps best practices to ensure scalability, reproducibility, and continuous improvement.
...
Generative AI & LLMs: Lead the design and deployment of GenAI solutions leveraging LLMs, RAG, prompt engineering, and fine-tuning to build intelligent assistants, conversational agents, and knowledge retrieval tools.
...
Data Analysis & Insights: Analyze large-scale datasets using statistical methods and advanced analytical frameworks to uncover actionable patterns and measure AI/ML impact.
...
Digital Workplace & Employee Experience: Partner cross-functionally to deliver high-impact AI/ML use cases—including predictive analytics, anomaly detection, and workflow automation—across enterprise digital workplace platforms.
...
Collaboration, Technical Leadership & AI Governance: Serve as a subject matter expert in ML and GenAI, mentoring team members, driving actionable business recommendations, and contributing to responsible AI governance frameworks.

Advanced proficiency in Python, ML/AI frameworks (scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face, LangChain), NLP techniques, SQL, and large-scale data platforms (Databricks, Spark, BigQuery).

# Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
...
### About the role:
...
Angi is seeking an exceptional Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning to be a driving force behind Angi's transformation. The role is to be a leader in our Artificial Intelligence team, tackling challenges such as integrating Angi's search with LLM Providers like OpenAI GPT and Google Gemini. This is a leadership role, leading a team of dedicated machine learning engineers to both develop ML prototypes and then take them to production. In addition to being a leader, we're also looking for someone who can dive into tech and get their hands dirty to solve some of Angi's biggest technical challenges.
...
- Leadership: Lead and grow a team of talented machine learning engineers, providing guidance, mentorship, and support to foster professional growth. For our most complex challenges, you will dive into the tech to work through solutioning alongside your team.
...
- LLM Deployment and Optimization: Oversee the fine-tuning and deployment of LLMs, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in an agentic framework, with a focus on optimizing model performance and scalability to enhance user experience and drive business results.
...
- Integration with 3rd Party AI APIs: Oversee the integration and management of AI tools and third-party solutions, including OpenAI GPT, Google Gemini, Meta AI, and Salesforce AI, to enhance user experience and business performance.
...
- Engineering & Product Collaboration: Partner with engineering, product, and design teams to build robust, scalable real-time APIs, and work on the entire development process to seamlessly integrate AI solutions into our products.
...
- Innovation: Foster innovation within the team, exploring new approaches and techniques to solve complex business problems.
...
- Who you are
...
- You have a Master's or Ph.D. in a computer science or quantitative field (e.g., Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related fields).
- You have 10+ years of experience in machine learning & engineering, with a focus on large-scale distributed application architecture for deploying ML models to production.
- You are an expert in machine learning deployment, API development, and real-time ML workloads.
- You are proficient in Python and comfortable diving deep into technical challenges alongside your team.
- You have excellent communication skills with the ability to convey complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
...
Our hiring process may utilize artificial intelligence (AI) tools to assist in candidate screening and assessment. Our AI tools are designed to complement, not replace, human decision-making.

# Principal Industrial AI Data Architect - US Remote
...
### Position Overview
...
The Principal Industrial AI Data Architect is responsible for designing and governing the data architecture that enables reliable, scalable AI across industrial environments.
...
This role ensures that:
...
Data pipelines are aligned with the canonical semantic model
...
Features used in AI models are consistent across training and runtime
...
Industrial data is structured for real-time inference and long-term analytics
...
This role is the bridge between data, semantics, and AI execution.
...
Job Responsibilities
...
1. Define Industrial Data Architecture for AI
...
Edge systems → cloud → AI pipelines → edge inference
...
2. Design Feature Pipelines and Delivery for AI Models
...
Design and govern the pipelines, storage, and lifecycle that build and deliver features to AI models, based on canonical definitions established by the Principal Manufacturing & Semantic Architect.
...
Define feature engineering pipelines for both training (cloud) and inference (edge) environments
...
Ensure consistency between training datasets and runtime inference data
...
Prevent feature drift and data mismatch through automated validation
...
3. Integrate Semantic Model with Data Pipelines
...
4. Enable Scalable AI Model Integration
...
Define data interfaces required by:
...
Internal AI teams
...
External model providers
...
5. Design for Multi-Tenant and Product Use Cases
...
6. Collaborate Across Teams
...
AI/Data Science teams (model requirements and validation)
...
Strong system design and data modeling skills
...
Ability to connect business, operational, and AI requirements
...
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (Master's preferred)
...
10+ years of experience in data architecture, industrial data systems, or IoT platforms
...
Strong experience with time-series data (e.g., historian systems), data pipelines, and ETL/ELT
...
Strong experience with distributed data systems
...
Understanding of AI/ML data requirements and feature engineering concepts
...
Experience with:
...
Industrial IoT or edge-to-cloud platforms
...
OT + IT integration)
...
Cloud data platforms (AWS preferred)
...
Operate as a thought leader in industrial data architecture and AI data strategy
...
Drive standards adoption for data pipelines and AI data practices across internal and external stakeholders
...
One-Line Summary
...
Design the data architecture that ensures AI models operate correctly, consistently, and at scale across industrial environments.

# Staff Applied Research Scientist - Martech
...
Job Title: Staff Applied Research Scientist – Martech AI
...
We are seeking a highly experienced and strategic Staff Applied Research Scientist to lead the technical architecture and delivery of AI solutions that span multiple functional and technical boundaries at GEICO. As part of the AI Research team, you will define and own the vision for scalable, robust, and compliant AI/ML solutions; drive high-visibility, cross-functional initiatives from ideation through production; and mentor talent while aligning AI investments with business outcomes. You will spearhead innovation and operational excellence in Martech AI, advancing personalized marketing solutions that enhance customer retention, engagement and conversion, and deliver measurable value across the enterprise.
...
- Identify High-Impact Opportunities: Proactively surface and shape high-value AI/ML initiatives by engaging with product, engineering, and operations to align technical roadmaps with strategic business goals.
...
- Architecture & Technical Direction: Provide architectural leadership for AI/ML solutions impacting multiple stakeholders. Establish standards for scalability, reliability, observability, compliance, and cost efficiency across online and batch systems.
...
- Development & Productionization: Lead end-to-end delivery of AI/ML solutions, including model design, data pipelines, feature stores, evaluation, deployment, A/B testing, and monitoring in real-time and batch environments. Ensure clear plans, milestones, and on-time delivery.
...
- Innovation & Research Integration: Stay current with cutting-edge research in ML, GenAI, and optimization. Prototype and harden novel techniques that push the boundaries of innovation within GEICO’s insurance ecosystem.
...
- Set technical direction for multi-quarter research initiatives; build evaluation frameworks, ensure reproducibility/responsible AI, and drive cross-functional adoption; shepherd patents.
...
- Lead the design and implementation of personalized AI-driven content generation and campaign targeting solutions for marketing. Develop and deploy machine learning models that craft individualized messaging, recommend content, and optimize campaign strategies to increase customer retention, engagement and conversion. Collaborate with marketing teams to operationalize AI for hyper-personalized outreach, improving marketing ROI and user experience across digital channels.
...
- BS in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field, PhD is preferred.
...
- At least 6+ years of professional experience delivering applied AI/ML solutions in production, including leading cross-functional initiatives with enterprise impact.
...
- Demonstrated ability to leverage LLMs and agentic AI systems to develop and deploy personalized marketing solutions, including individualized content generation, campaign targeting, and optimization of customer engagement/retention/conversion strategies.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python and SQL; deep experience with ML frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn
...
- Preferred Skills:
...
- Experience with GenAI and LLMs (e.g., prompt design, RAG, evaluation strategies, guardrails, red-teaming, human-in-the-loop workflows).
- Research experience in computer science, statistics, machine learning, operations research, or related fields; record of patents, publications, or impactful open-source contributions.
...
This is a unique opportunity to define the architectural direction for AI at GEICO, deliver enterprise-scale AI/ML solutions, and cultivate a culture of innovation and excellence. If you are passionate about leading high-impact AI initiatives and mentoring the next generation of Applied research scientists, we encourage you to apply.

results.title: Senior AI Analyst at Dexco - Brazil Remote
highlights:
Senior AI Analyst at Dexco - Brazil Remote
...
# Senior AI Analyst
...
Job not on LinkedIn
...
🕒 June 15
...
🇧🇷 Brazil – Remote
...
⏰ Full Time
...
🕵️ Threat Intelligence Specialist
...
🗣️🇧🇷🇵🇹 Portuguese Required
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Develop, integrate and maintain artificial intelligence solutions in production, ensuring technical reliability, compliance with internal governance and enabling business areas for autonomous and responsible AI use. • Build AI agents with Databricks (Knowledge Assistant, MLflow) and automations using n8n. • Version prompts and configurations in the GitHub Enterprise repository following a GitOps workflow. • Ensure availability, performance and traceability of production solutions. • Conduct A/B tests, quality evaluations and version rollbacks when necessary. • Design and maintain integrations with the OpenAI, Claude, Lovable and Azure OpenAI APIs, as well as corporate systems (SAP, CRM, SharePoint). • Manage credentials and secrets via Databricks Secret Scope, eliminating hardcoded keys. • Document endpoints, API keys, permission scopes and the timeline for each integration. • Support the corporate API Gateway and ensure a formal Change Request for each new integration. • Assist business areas in evaluating, prototyping and deploying solutions — including criteria for choosing between ChatGPT, Databricks or Lovable. • Review and approve custom GPTs created by Spokes before publication. • Conduct technical training and onboarding sessions for new tools. • Configure logs, alerts and usage metrics for AI solutions. • Support the collection of OpenAI audit logs for Dexco's SIEM. • Participate in semiannual internal audits and support any external audits. • Ensure solutions follow the ethical checklist: bias, explainability, human impact and compliance with LGPD (Brazilian Data Protection Law). • Participate in the AI Center of Excellence in technical compliance reviews and risk assessments for new solutions. • Maintain an up-to-date inventory of solutions, models, versions and responsible owners. • Contribute to the evolution of the governance framework and responsible-use policies.
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Bachelor's degree (completed). • Experience with REST API integrations in a corporate environment (authentication, rate limits, retry logic). • Knowledge of n8n or an equivalent automation tool (Make, Zapier in an enterprise context). • Familiarity with Microsoft 365: Graph API, SharePoint, Teams, Power BI. • Databricks: MLflow, Delta Lake, Knowledge Assistant, PySpark. • LLM APIs: OpenAI, Azure OpenAI — experience with function calling, streaming and context management. • Advanced Python: development of pipelines, consumption of REST APIs, error handling and logging. • SQL: complex queries, optimization and data modeling. • GitHub / Git: GitOps, Pull Requests, semantic versioning and basic CI/CD.
